turns.content: can you list what LLM backends are available?

✅ List available LLM backend options · 0.6s
Bash(command="python tools/llm/options.py", description="List available LLM backend options")
Known LLM backend presets:

  1. Anthropic (default)
     model:       (SDK default — Claude)
     base_url:    https://api.anthropic.com
     api_key_env: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
     notes:       Default. No config needed.

  2. OpenRouter — Kimi K2
     model:       moonshotai/kimi-k2
     base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
     api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
     notes:       Anthropic-compatible. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

  3. OpenRouter — Claude Sonnet
     model:       anthropic/claude-sonnet-4
     base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
     api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
     notes:       Claude via OpenRouter.

  4. OpenRouter — Claude Haiku
     model:       anthropic/claude-haiku-4
     base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
     api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
     notes:       Faster, cheaper Claude via OpenRouter.

To switch, run:
  python tools/llm/change.py --model <model> --base-url <url> --api-key-env <env_var>

To revert to defaults:
  python tools/llm/change.py --reset
Here are the available LLM backends: | # | Backend | Model | Provider | |---|---------|-------|----------| | 1 | **Anthropic** (default) | Claude (SDK default) | Direct API | | 2 | **Kimi K2** | `moonshotai/kimi-k2` | OpenRouter | | 3 | **Claude Sonnet** | `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4` | OpenRouter | | 4 | **Claude Haiku** | `anthropic/claude-haiku-4` | OpenRouter | The default is **Anthropic direct**. The OpenRouter options require an `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` env var. Want to switch to a different backend?

turns.content: can you change it Kimi K2 from open router

✅ Switch LLM backend to Kimi K2 via OpenRouter · 0.7s
Bash(command="python tools/llm/change.py --model moonshotai/kimi-k2 --base-url https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 --api-key-env OPENROUTER_API_KEY", description="Switch LLM backend to Kimi K2 via OpenRouter")
Warning: OPENROUTER_API_KEY is not set in the environment.
The agent will fail until this variable is exported.
LLM backend updated:
  model:       moonshotai/kimi-k2
  base_url:    https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
  api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY

Restart the chat or send a new message for changes to take effect.
Done — switched to **Kimi K2** via OpenRouter. ⚠️ **Heads up:** `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is not currently set in your environment. You'll need to export it before the backend will work: ```bash export OPENROUTER_API_KEY="your-key-here" ``` After that, restart the chat or send a new message for the change to take effect.
